goal: 修复已有项目中失败的测试，并生成修复报告
purpose: Validate verification failure handling, debug repair, backup creation, experiment recording, and final reporting.
expected_capabilities: Records the failed attempt as an experiment with a blocked or retry decision.
Creates backups for modified files before writing.
acceptance: The fixture test fails before repair.
The fixture test passes after repair.
At least one backup manifest is created for the modified source file.
Final report lists the repaired artifact.
recommended_command: agent /run "修复已有项目中失败的测试，并生成修复报告" --root <workspace>
